name: Atlantic Regional
description_short: Atlantic Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union offering comprehensive personal and business banking, lending, and insurance services.
description_long:
Atlantic Federal Credit Union is a federally-chartered credit union celebrating its 85th year of operation, serving members through digital and branch-based channels. The institution is NCUA-insured and emphasizes accessibility, with AudioEye-enabled website optimization and multiple service delivery channels including mobile apps, video banking, and shared branching.

Atlantic FCU offers a full suite of financial products across personal and business segments. Personal services include checking and savings accounts (Kasasa Cash, Kasasa Saver, Money Market), certificates of deposit, IRAs, HSAs, auto loans (3.99% APR promotional rate), home mortgage loans with refinance options, personal loans, debt consolidation, credit cards, and recreational/equipment loans. Business offerings include business checking, savings, certificates, commercial term loans, SBA loans, equipment financing, and commercial construction loans. The credit union also provides insurance (auto, home, renters, life, pet, umbrella, commercial) and investment advisory services.

Atlantic distinguishes itself through member-centric features like the Kasasa rewards program that pays dividends on qualifying checking and savings accounts, a 90-day payment deferral on auto loans, pre-approval mortgage programs, and specialized small business financing including SBA loans. The institution emphasizes local mortgage loan officers and relationship-based lending. Digital banking tools include deposit alerts, mobile pay, iTalk telephone banking, chatbot support, and video banking options.

As a credit union, Atlantic operates on a not-for-profit, member-owned model, which typically translates to lower fees and competitive rates. However, membership eligibility requirements apply, and the institution's services breadth means it competes directly with both banks and larger credit unions. The website content does not disclose specific rate comparisons, membership eligibility criteria, or detailed fee structures, limiting transparency on competitive positioning.
services: Personal checking accounts (Kasasa Cash, Kasasa Cash Back, Member Checking)
Personal savings and money market accounts
Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs) and Health Savings Accounts (HSAs)
Auto loans with 3.99% APR and 90-day deferred payment options
Home mortgage loans and refinancing with local loan officers
Personal loans, lines of credit, debt consolidation, and recreational loans
Business checking, savings, and commercial lending (SBA loans, term loans, construction loans)
Credit cards and payment protection services
Personal and commercial insurance (auto, home, life, umbrella, general liability, workers compensation)
Digital banking (mobile apps, video banking, iTalk telephone banking, chatbot support)
Shared branching, surcharge-free ATMs, and check reordering services
pros: Kasasa rewards program pays dividends on qualifying checking and savings accounts with no monthly fees
Auto loans feature 3.99% APR promotional rate with 90-day payment deferral on new, used, and refinanced vehicles
Comprehensive mortgage services with local loan officers and quick decision turnaround
Specialized small business financing including SBA loans and commercial construction loans
Multiple service channels: mobile apps (iOS/Android), video banking, chatbot, telephone banking, and shared branching
Surcharge-free ATM network access for members
Insurance services integrated directly (auto, home, life, business) eliminating need for external providers
cons: No membership eligibility criteria disclosed on website; may restrict access compared to banks
Specific APRs, fees, and rate comparisons not provided online; requires contact for accurate pricing
Limited transparency on insurance underwriting and claims processing details
No information provided on loan approval timelines or credit score requirements
Website security warning (Chrome vulnerability notice) may deter some prospective members from applying online
best_for: Members seeking rewards-based checking and savings with dividend earnings through Kasasa programs
Borrowers shopping for auto loans willing to wait 90 days before first payment
Small business owners needing SBA loans and commercial construction financing from a relationship-based lender
Homebuyers and refinancers who prefer working with local mortgage officers and want quick decisions
diagnosis: Atlantic Federal Credit Union is best for existing or eligible members seeking a full-service financial institution with competitive auto and mortgage rates, rewards-based checking/savings, and integrated insurance and business lending. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements likely apply, and specific rates, fees, and approval criteria are not transparently disclosed online, requiring direct contact for accurate pricing comparisons.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Atlantic Regional — NCUA-insured credit union in South Portland, ME. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
